narrative:
Athens 1-2 (precinct in Athens County) has 489 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 3.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 50.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 47.2 percentage points.
